Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanction Snad Striking Claim
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Terminating Sanction And Striking Claim is Granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Anthony Schoenberg; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
